what_changed: Created minimal valid template instances for seven machine-checkable assistant-work template specs.
Created expected rejection instances for the same seven specs.
Created sandbox-local agent boot exercises for seven specialist agents.
Added validator and focused tests for template instance/boot exercise evidence.
Updated AI Assistant Work state index to v0.5 as candidate current-context state.
non_claims: Candidate template instances do not make the template specs accepted law.
Agent boot exercises are sandbox-local simulations, not real isolated agent invocations.
No external IDE, CLI, cloud, PR, GitHub, MCP, Codex, daemon, or production action was performed.
No ION/03_registry or product-front-door landing occurred.
